basis: Local seed identifies a UR legendary creature from Secrets of Strixhaven Commander.
Scryfall card context verifies the instant/sorcery trigger and myriad copy text.
EDHREC Commander context and secondary-commander commentary exist; cEDH relevance is not proven.

source_limit_notes: ETB and token payoffs are curated role signals, not copied decklists.
Nonlegendary creature copy targets should remain a deliberate package.

themes.name: izzet_spells_into_myriad_creature_copy
themes.notes: Casting instants and sorceries lets Muddle copy a nonlegendary creature and gain myriad for combat.

themes.name: etb_combat_damage_copy_targets
themes.notes: Nonlegendary creatures with ETB, attack, or combat-damage triggers make myriad copies meaningful.

themes.name: token_enter_damage_payoffs
themes.notes: Myriad tokens can trigger impact damage, draw-on-combat, and token count payoffs.

themes.name: spellslinger_velocity
themes.notes: Cheap cantrips and interaction keep the trigger available without replacing creature targets.

examples: legendary creatures that Muddle cannot legally copy with its trigger
avoid_patterns.reason: Muddle targets only nonlegendary creatures you control.

examples: pure storm list with no good copy targets
avoid_patterns.reason: The commander needs creatures worth becoming.
Do not import off-identity token packages into UR.
